TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nick_Anderson, title = Nick_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nick_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Nick Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 1, Nick Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Nick Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 1, Nick Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: niʦ~ʨk an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, niʦ~ʨk an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
